frontmatter.title: Add-on UI SDK Constants Reference
frontmatter.description: Complete technical specification for all Add-on UI SDK constants including import patterns, dual-access vs named-only exports, and detailed reference details.

questions.question: Which constants require imports and which are available through addOnUISdk.constants?
questions.answer: Four constants are named-only exports and MUST be imported: AppEvent, ColorPickerEvent, SupportedMimeTypes, and EntrypointType. All other constants support dual access - you can either import them OR use addOnUISdk.constants.*

questions.question: What happens if I try to access AppEvent through addOnUISdk.constants?
questions.answer: It will return undefined. AppEvent, ColorPickerEvent, SupportedMimeTypes, and EntrypointType are only available as named exports and must be imported directly from the SDK.

questions.question: What are the available rendition formats for document export?
questions.answer: The RenditionFormat constant provides: jpg (image/jpeg), png (image/png), mp4 (video/mp4), pdf (application/pdf), and pptx (PowerPoint presentation).

questions.question: How do I import all constants at once?
questions.answer: Use: import addOnUISdk, { AppEvent, ColorPickerEvent, SupportedMimeTypes, EntrypointType, Range, RenditionFormat, Variant, ButtonType, FieldType, PlatformType, DeviceClass, PlatformEnvironment, EditorPanel, MediaTabs, ElementsTabs, AuthorizationStatus, DialogResultType, RuntimeType, BleedUnit, PanelActionType, ColorPickerPlacement, VideoResolution, FrameRate, BitRate, FileSizeLimitUnit, LinkOptions, RenditionIntent } from 'https://express.adobe.com/static/add-on-sdk/sdk.js';

questions.question: What dialog variants are available?
questions.answer: The Variant constant provides: confirmation, information, warning, destructive, error, input, and custom dialog types.

questions.question: What video resolutions are supported for MP4 renditions?
questions.answer: VideoResolution supports: sd480p, hd720p, fhd1080p, qhd1440p, uhd2160p (4K), and custom resolution options.

questions.question: Which Editor panels can be opened programmatically?
questions.answer: EditorPanel constant includes: search, yourStuff, templates, media, text, elements, grids, brands, and addOns panels.

questions.question: What are the available page range options for renditions?
questions.answer: The Range constant provides: currentPage, entireDocument, and specificPages options.

questions.question: What platform types can be detected?
questions.answer: PlatformType includes: iOS, iPadOS, chromeOS, android, chromeBrowser, firefoxBrowser, edgeBrowser, samsungBrowser, safariBrowser, and unknown.

questions.question: What events can I listen for with AppEvent?
questions.answer: AppEvent includes: themechange, localechange, formatchange, reset, dragstart, dragend, dragcancel, documentIdAvailable, documentLinkAvailable, documentPublishedLinkAvailable, documentTitleChange, and documentExportAllowedChange.
